queries.query_text: A modular floating photovoltaic platform with a rectangular floating frame and an internal cross-shaped stiffener that retains four buoyancy pontoons, supporting a tilted bifacial solar panel and anchored at the corners by deadweight blocks.
A rectangular floating deck or raft for solar panels that is divided into sections and uses internal beams to create compartments for float elements or pontoons.
A cross-shaped internal frame that creates four bays to capture removable buoyancy pontoons or float cassettes in a floating solar module.

A floating solar power plant monitoring system that measures front and rear module temperature and solar irradiance with sensors connected to a data logger and wireless telemetry to a remote database or SCADA cloud.
Corner mooring for a floating solar platform using concrete deadweight anchors or blocks with coated wire rope cables and bridle lines to keep a floating raft in position.
Triangular supports or A-frame mounting brackets on a floating photovoltaic platform to hold a bifacial solar module so the rear side is exposed for reflection and ventilation.

args.query: Floating solar photovoltaic platform with a rectangular floating frame and cross-shaped internal support holding four pontoons, with a tilted bifacial solar panel mount and corner deadweight mooring blocks
@(dwpi_title,dwpi_abstract) ((floating NEAR/3 photovoltaic) OR (floating NEAR/3 solar) OR FPV) AND (pontoon OR buoyancy OR buoyant) AND (platform OR float OR module)
A pontoon supported rectangular floating platform for solar panels where an internal cross beam or cruciform frame supports equipment and separates four buoyancy pontoons or float units

Monitoring and telemetry for floating photovoltaic arrays measuring module front temperature and rear temperature, irradiance sensors, data logger, wireless gateway, cloud database or SCADA for remote supervision
Deadweight anchoring for floating solar platforms using concrete blocks on the water bottom connected by coated wire rope or sheathed cables and mooring bridles at the corners of a floating raft
A-frame or triangular bracket mounting structure for bifacial photovoltaic modules on a floating solar platform, allowing rear side exposure and ventilation with a tilted rack

@(dwpi_title,dwpi_abstract) ((floating NEAR/3 photovoltaic) OR (floating NEAR/3 solar) OR FPV) AND ((cross NEAR/3 frame) OR (cross-shaped NEAR/3 frame) OR cruciform OR (X-shaped NEAR/3 frame) OR (grid NEAR/3 frame)) AND (pontoon OR buoyancy OR float* OR buoyant module)

@(dwpi_title,dwpi_abstract) ((floating NEAR/3 platform) OR (floating NEAR/3 dock) OR (modular NEAR/3 float) OR pontoon*) AND (cruciform OR (cross-shaped NEAR/3 frame) OR (X-shaped NEAR/3 frame) OR (cross NEAR/3 member)) AND (insert* OR retain* OR receptacle OR opening OR cavity) AND (four OR 4)
@(dwpi_title,dwpi_abstract) ((floating NEAR/3 photovoltaic) OR (floating NEAR/3 solar) OR FPV) AND ((A-frame OR "A frame" OR triangular OR tripod) NEAR/5 (support OR mount OR bracket OR rack))

@(dwpi_title,dwpi_abstract) (bifacial NEAR/5 (floating OR float* OR platform OR mount OR rack)) OR (@(dwpi_title,dwpi_abstract) (bifacial NEAR/5 photovoltaic) AND (float* OR pontoon OR "floating solar"))

@(dwpi_title,dwpi_abstract) ((floating NEAR/3 photovoltaic) OR (floating NEAR/3 solar) OR FPV OR "floating PV") AND ((temperature NEAR/3 sensor) OR thermistor OR "backside temperature" OR "rear side" NEAR/3 temperature) AND (irradiance OR pyranometer OR insolation)

@(title,abstract,claims) (("concrete block" OR deadweight) NEAR/20 (mooring OR moor*) NEAR/20 (floating solar OR floating photovoltaic OR floating platform) NEAR/20 (corner OR vertex) NEAR/20 (bridle OR "wire rope" OR cable))

@(title,abstract,claims) ((bifacial OR "double sided" OR "dual-sided") NEAR/20 (floating OR pontoon OR "floating solar" OR "floating photovoltaic") NEAR/20 ((temperature OR thermal) NEAR/10 (sensor OR monitor* OR measurement)) NEAR/20 (rear OR backside OR backsheet OR "rear side"))

@(title,abstract,claims) ((floating photovoltaic OR floating solar) NEAR/20 (bifacial OR "double-sided") NEAR/20 (albedo OR bifaciality OR "bifacial gain" OR "rear irradiance") NEAR/20 (monitor* OR sensor* OR measure*))

npl_queries.query_text: TS=((floating photovoltaic OR floating solar) AND (bifacial OR "double sided") AND (rear irradiance OR albedo OR bifacial gain OR backside temperature OR temperature sensor))

semantic_queries.query_text: Modular floating platform for solar or other equipment with a rectangular perimeter frame and an internal cross or cruciform structure that forms bays to retain multiple buoyant inserts or pontoons.
Floating photovoltaic platform using triangular or A-frame mounting structures that support bifacial solar panels above the floaters to allow light to reach the rear side.
Corner mooring arrangement for a floating PV platform that uses deadweight concrete blocks with wire rope or cable bridles connecting to corner fittings of the floating frame.
Bifacial solar modules on a floating photovoltaic platform with monitoring of rear-side performance such as backside temperature sensors or rear irradiance/albedo sensors to estimate bifacial gain.

Floating PV array built from modular rectangular frames with internal cruciform braces retaining multiple float/pontoon inserts, supporting bifacial panels on A-frame mounts, with corner moorings using deadweight concrete blocks and cable bridles, and sensors for rear-side temperature or bifacial performance monitoring.

semantic_queries.query_text: A floating platform floatation body with a cruciform or cross shaped internal partition wall that divides the interior into four compartments, each compartment sized to receive a removable buoyancy pontoon insert
Modular float for floating solar where an internal grid frame with cross members creates four bays that retain buoyancy blocks or foam pontoons as replaceable cartridges
Plastic float with internal bulkheads forming quadrant chambers for holding separate pontoons, with the pontoons inserted and locked in place by the partition structure
Floating dock or raft module having X shaped or plus shaped stiffener ribs that create four separate cavities for buoyancy inserts, allowing individual replacement of each buoyant element

Bifacial photovoltaic monitoring system that measures front side irradiance and rear side irradiance or albedo, and measures both front and back module temperature, storing data in a logger and transmitting wirelessly to a cloud database
Floating bifacial solar raft with sensors for backsheet temperature and underside irradiance, connected to an onboard data acquisition unit with cellular or LoRa telemetry for remote monitoring

Solar plant performance monitoring using paired upward and downward facing pyranometers to compute albedo and bifacial gain, with module temperature sensors on both sides and a wireless gateway sending data to SCADA

Photovoltaic module monitoring device with front and rear temperature sensors and front and rear irradiance sensors, where a datalogger collects the signals and transmits them via wireless network to a remote server

SCADA for floating photovoltaic power station where each float or string has irradiance sensor, albedo sensor, and temperature sensors on top and underside of bifacial panels, with telemetry to a remote monitoring platform
